---
title: "Pricing & Registration"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------+
| Course                                                                                                     | Price    | Details                                                      | \# participants |
+============================================================================================================+==========+==============================================================+=================+
| [R best practices](https://r-best-practices.njtierney.com/)                                                | \$450    | -   6hr practical instruction                                | 6               |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
| [Prepare reproducible and compelling documents with Quarto](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/)                |          | -   3x60 min office hour sessions (1 in-course; 2 follow-up) |                 |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
| [How to create better graphics using R](https://better-vis.njtierney.com/)                                 |          |                                                              |                 |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
| [Level up your R programming by learning functions and debugging](https://fun2debug.njtierney.com/)        |          |                                                              |                 |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
| [Efficiently track changes and collaborate with Git and GitHub](https://gentle-git.njtierney.com/)         |          |                                                              |                 |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
| [Learn the introductory fundamentals of R package development](https://intro2rpkgs.njtierney.com/)         |          |                                                              |                 |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------+
| [Save time and ensure reproducibility using targets and geotargets](https://gentle-targets.njtierney.com/) | \$900    | -   12 hr practical instruction                              | 6               |
|                                                                                                            |          |                                                              |                 |
|                                                                                                            |          | -   6x60 min office hour sessions (2 in-course; 4 follow-up) |                 |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+----------+--------------------------------------------------------------+-----------------+

All courses include:

-   Recorded sessions for flexible review.
-   Free online learning materials (yours to keep forever).
-   Private learner-only content and exercises.

All courses will also feature one heavily discounted scholarship, priced at \$6 AUD. More details on applying for scholarships will be announced soon.

## Pilot program

As these courses are currently in development, I will be offering discounted "pilot" runs of each course. These will be starting from approximately May 2026, details to follow soon.

## Registration

To register or discuss which courses would be best for your team:

-   **Email**: info\@njtierney.com
-   **Website**: [training.njtierney.com](https://training.njtierney.com)

Course schedules and availability updated regularly.

**Note** that pricing will increase as courses become established. Lock in current rates by registering early.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

[← Back to course catalog](index.qmd)
